$comment: Single source of truth for kun engine metadata. Prose/docs reference this file instead of hardcoding numbers. /health (.claude/scripts/health.sh) reads it and warns when docs or reality drift from these values. Agent frontmatter uses a model alias (`opus`/`sonnet`/`haiku` per `model_tiers`) — never pin a version number there.

billing.$comment: Max 5x ($100/mo) for the time being — corrected from Max 20x on 2026-06-12. Subscription-ONLY posture: no usage-based credits, no API-key per-token spend — changing this requires a /decide entry + Abdout approval (captain ESCALATE gate: budget > $50/mo). Check /usage per-category weekly to stay inside plan caps.

sync.$comment: Self-update stamps per tier — /sync refreshes them; the captain flags overdue tiers at session start. null = never synced (due immediately). Sources of the form gh:owner/repo are read via `gh api .../releases`. Material adoptions land in docs/CONFIG-BENCHMARK.md → Adoption log.

practice: community Claude Code configs — survey set in docs/CONFIG-BENCHMARK.md → Sources

model_tiers.$comment: Per-agent model alias by task type. The portable stack fleet (~/.claude/agents) follows this; the project fleet defaults to opus (quality-over-speed) except purely mechanical agents.
model_tiers.opus: architecture, orchestration, deep reasoning, code review/fixes, and strategy/leadership agents (incl. captain)
model_tiers.sonnet: standard build agents + the mechanical project agent (package)
model_tiers.haiku: routine/formatting agents (comment, git, icon, github, semantic, sse, structure)
